member.name: T:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService
member.summary: Abstract base class for hosted background services that automatically tracks each job invocation with TraceStax.
member.remarks:
Subclasses implement rather than . The base class wraps each invocation with TrackStart / TrackSuccess / TrackFailure calls so instrumentation requires no boilerplate in the derived class.
For periodic workloads prefer which additionally handles the wait interval between ticks.

member.name: P:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService.TraceStaxClient
member.summary: Gets the used for instrumentation.

member.name: P:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService.JobName
member.summary: Gets the logical name of the job, used as the task type on the TraceStax dashboard (e.g. "OrderExpiryJob").

member.name: P:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService.QueueName
member.summary: Gets the queue or worker-group name reported to TraceStax (e.g. "critical", "default").

member.name: M:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService.#ctor(TraceStax.TraceStaxClient)
member.summary: Initialises the base class.

member.name: M:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService.ExecuteJobAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Implement this method to perform one unit of work. The base class calls it in a loop from and handles all tracking.
member.param: Token that is cancelled when the host is stopping.

member.name: M:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs the service loop. Derived classes that need a custom loop strategy (e.g. event-driven) may override this, but most should implement instead.

member.name: M:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxBackgroundService.RunTrackedAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes one invocation wrapped in TraceStax tracking. Cancellation is re-thrown so the loop in can exit cleanly.

member.name: T:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxPeriodicBackgroundService
member.summary: A that uses a to run on a fixed interval.

member.name: M:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxPeriodicBackgroundService.#ctor(TraceStax.TraceStaxClient,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Initialises the periodic background service.
member.param: How long to wait between each invocation of .

member.name: M:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxPeriodicBackgroundService.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: Waits for the next timer tick before each invocation so that the interval is honoured regardless of how long takes.

member.name: T:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering TraceStax services in the .NET dependency injection container.

member.name: M:TraceStax.Extensions.TraceStaxServiceCollectionExtensions.AddTraceStax(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a singleton in the service collection.
member.param: The service collection to add to.
Optional base URL of the TraceStax ingest service. When null the default production endpoint (https://ingest.tracestax.com) is used.
member.returns: The same instance for fluent chaining.

member.name: T:TraceStax.Hangfire.TraceStaxJobFilter
member.summary: Hangfire server filter that automatically records job lifecycle events to TraceStax.
member.remarks:
Register once during application startup:
GlobalJobFilters.Filters.Add(new TraceStaxJobFilter(client));

member.name: M:TraceStax.Hangfire.TraceStaxJobFilter.#ctor(TraceStax.TraceStaxClient)
member.summary: Creates a new .

member.name: T:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxConsumeObserver
member.summary: MassTransit consume observer that automatically records message consumption lifecycle events to TraceStax.

member.name: M:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxConsumeObserver.#ctor(TraceStax.TraceStaxClient)
member.summary: Creates a new .

member.name: M:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxConsumeObserver.PreConsume``1(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{``0})
member.remarks: Records the wall-clock start time and fires a TrackStart event. The run ID reported to TraceStax is the message's CorrelationId when present, otherwise a newly generated GUID. The entry is keyed by MessageId (always set by MassTransit) so that the same run ID is used across all three lifecycle callbacks even when no CorrelationId is present.

member.name: M:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxConsumeObserver.PostConsume``1(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{``0})
member.remarks: Fires a TrackSuccess event with the elapsed duration.

member.name: M:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxConsumeObserver.ConsumeFault``1(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{``0},System.Exception)
member.remarks: Fires a TrackFailure event with the elapsed duration and the fault exception.

member.name: M:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxConsumeObserver.DequeueInflight``1(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{``0})
member.summary: Looks up the in-flight entry for the message identified by MessageId, removes it from the dictionary, and returns the (runId, elapsedMs) pair. If the entry is not found (e.g. because PreConsume was not called) a fallback run ID and zero duration are returned.

member.name: M:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxConsumeObserver.ResolveQueueName``1(MassTransit.ConsumeContext{``0})
member.summary: Derives a human-readable queue name from the last non-empty path segment of the receive endpoint's input address, e.g. rabbitmq://localhost/order-created → order-created. Falls back to the full absolute path when no segment can be extracted.

member.name: T:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxMassTransitExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for integrating TraceStax with MassTransit.

member.name: M:TraceStax.MassTransit.TraceStaxMassTransitExtensions.AddTraceStax(MassTransit.IBusControl,TraceStax.TraceStaxClient)
member.summary: Attaches a to the bus control so that all message consumption events are automatically tracked in TraceStax.
member.returns: The same instance to allow fluent chaining.

member.name: T:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient
member.summary:
Core TraceStax client. All network calls are fire-and-forget — exceptions are swallowed silently so instrumentation can never destabilise the host process.
Resilience features: - Circuit breaker: 3 consecutive failures → OPEN (silent drop) → 30 s cooldown - X-Retry-After header support - Backpressure directive from heartbeat response - Thread dump capture via Environment.StackTrace / StackTrace class

member.name: F:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient._dispatchDelayMs
member.summary: Grows exponentially on consecutive failures (up to 60 s), halves on success. Applied as a pre-dispatch delay inside FireAndForget tasks.

member.name: F:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient._pendingTasks
member.summary: Stores job identity (jobType, queue) from TrackStart so success/failure events reuse it.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Creates a new .

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.TrackStart(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Records that a job has started. Fire-and-forget.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.TrackSuccess(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Records that a job completed successfully. Fire-and-forget.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.TrackFailure(System.String,System.Int64,System.Exception)
member.summary: Records that a job failed. Fire-and-forget.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.HeartbeatAsync(System.String,System.String[],System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Sends a worker heartbeat synchronously and returns the server directives, or null on error.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.Heartbeat(System.String,System.String[],System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Fire-and-forget heartbeat (backwards-compatible; directives ignored).

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.SetPauseUntil(System.Int64)
member.summary: Pauses ingest delivery until the given epoch millisecond timestamp.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.ExecuteCommand(TraceStax.HeartbeatCommand)
member.summary: Executes a server-issued command. Currently supports "thread_dump".

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.Snapshot(System.String,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Sends a queue-depth snapshot. Fire-and-forget.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.CloseAsync(System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Waits for any in-flight fire-and-forget tasks to complete, up to . A slow or unreachable server cannot hang the host process beyond this deadline.

member.name: M:TraceStax.TraceStaxClient.GetStats
member.summary: Returns a snapshot of the client's internal health metrics.

member.name: T:TraceStax.HeartbeatDirectives
member.summary: Directives returned by the server in the heartbeat response.

member.name: M:TraceStax.HeartbeatDirectives.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{TraceStax.HeartbeatCommand})
member.summary: Directives returned by the server in the heartbeat response.

member.name: T:TraceStax.HeartbeatCommand
member.summary: A single server-issued command.

member.name: M:TraceStax.HeartbeatCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: A single server-issued command.

member.name: T:TraceStax.ClientStats
member.summary: Snapshot of SDK health metrics, returned by .

member.name: M:TraceStax.ClientStats.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int64,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Snapshot of SDK health metrics, returned by .
